name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash Phoenix, Arizona — Speedy Cash offers payday loans up to $425, lines of credit to $4,000, and title loans to $4,000 with same-day or next-da...
description_long:
Speedy Cash is a short-term lending company with multiple locations across Tennessee and surrounding states, including a store at 5126 Summer Avenue in Memphis, TN. The company operates under the brand "Check Into Cash" in some locations and positions itself as a neighborhood financial services provider offering fast access to cash for emergency expenses.

The company's core offerings include payday loans (up to $425 with repayment due around the next payday), lines of credit (up to $4,000 with flexible draw options and repayment over time), and title loans (up to $4,000 using a vehicle as collateral). Beyond lending, Speedy Cash provides money services including check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and Green Dot prepaid debit cards. All services are available both online and in-store, with the Memphis location offering extended hours (9am-7pm most weekdays).

The company distinguishes itself through in-store customer service and transparent pricing. According to their website, borrowers receive detailed explanations of loan terms before signing, know exact borrowing costs upfront, and can ask questions throughout the application process. They emphasize the in-store experience as preferable for some customers and maintain a local presence with multiple Memphis-area locations.

However, Speedy Cash operates in the high-cost lending space. Payday loans and title loans are inherently expensive financial products, typically carrying APRs well above 300%. While the company provides transparency and accessibility, these products serve as emergency-only solutions for borrowers with limited credit options. Consumers should exhaust alternatives like employer advances, credit union PALs, or personal loans before considering these offerings.
pros: Payday loans available up to $425 with same-day or next-day funding for emergencies
Lines of credit up to $4,000 with flexible borrowing and repayment structure
Title loans up to $4,000 using vehicle collateral for larger borrowing needs
Transparent pricing: borrowers know exact loan costs before signing
Multiple in-store locations in Memphis area for convenient access
Extended hours available (9am-7pm most weekdays at Summer Ave location)
Additional money services including check cashing, wire transfers, and money orders
Online application option available in addition to in-store application
cons: High-cost lending products with APRs typically exceeding 300% (standard for payday/title loans)
Payday loans limited to $425 maximum, requiring frequent rollovers for larger needs
Title loans require clear title and vehicle appraisal, creating barriers for some applicants
Lines of credit require proof of employment/income, excluding self-employed or gig workers with documentation challenges
Sunday closure and limited Saturday hours (9am-4pm) restrict accessibility for some customers
best_for: Consumers facing unexpected emergencies needing cash within 24 hours with no credit alternatives
Borrowers with vehicles seeking larger loans up to $4,000 using collateral
Individuals needing flexible credit access through a line of credit for ongoing expenses
Customers in Memphis area needing check cashing or money transfer services
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is appropriate for consumers facing legitimate financial emergencies who have exhausted payday-alternatives like employer advances or credit union PALs and have no access to personal loans or credit cards. The primary caveat is that payday and title loans carry extremely high costs (300%+ APR) and should only be used for true emergencies, not ongoing financial management, due to the debt cycle risk these products create.
